source: Google AI Studio project recovery lane

policy.secrets: No API keys, OAuth tokens, customer files, or private prompts are stored here.
policy.launch_rule: Projects can be linked, staged, and deployed only after the operator confirms the source files and Vercel target.
policy.handoff: Hermes/Open WebUI may use this manifest as a routing map, not as authority to mutate billing, DNS, production data, or credentials.

projects.name: Watermark Remix
projects.satcom_action: Wrap the existing watermark UI as a client-ready remix tool, then create a Vercel target.
projects.launch_target: Vercel static/app route after source confirmation

projects.name: Flerish Studio
projects.satcom_action: Import or paste the AI Studio project files, verify spelling and brand lane, then stage as a SATCOM launch card.
projects.launch_target: Vercel project or SATCOM sub-route after source import

projects.name: Watermark Tracker
local_evidence: No dedicated local app folder found in /Users/Ace/Codex
projects.satcom_action: Bring source export into SATCOM, define tracker inputs/outputs, then connect it to the Watermark Remix lane.
projects.launch_target: Vercel route after working local build

projects.name: VDJ MIDI
local_evidence: No dedicated local app folder found in /Users/Ace/Codex
projects.satcom_action: Import the AI Studio project, classify browser-only versus desktop/MIDI dependencies, and decide if Vercel is a preview or docs launcher.
projects.launch_target: Vercel preview only if browser-safe; otherwise SATCOM docs/control card

projects.name: MyAppStore
projects.source_system: Local repo plus Google AI Studio adjunct
projects.satcom_action: Build and deploy the existing Vite app, then add the Vercel URL back into SATCOM.

projects.name: Live Intelligence
projects.satcom_action: Promote the client-safe routing board into the MyAppStore dashboard and link the launch surface from SATCOM.
projects.launch_target: Vercel with client-safe mock mode until signal feed credentials are approved
